launches.name: The Tech Buzz
launches.tagline: The future of tech insights
launches.description: For Those Eager To Spearhead Tech Innovation, Gain Critical Market Insights, And Engage With The Visionaries Crafting Our Technological Future.

launches.name: Is your idea worth building? Find out.
launches.tagline: Find out if your idea is worth the time and money to build
launches.description: Describe your business idea and get a full viability analysis in seconds — verdict with a score, realistic TAM/SAM/SOM, tech stack costs, marketing tactics that actually fit your idea, red flags, and comparable companies that tried something similar. If your idea uses AI, you also get token-level cost modelling at 100, 1k, and 10k users. No login. No subscription. $19 one-time for the full report.

launches.name: Agent Context
launches.tagline: Attach reference projects for AI coding tools
launches.description: Developers reuse code from other projects, but the workflow is messy, copying files, juggling workspaces, or feeding context to AI tools. Agent Context lets you attach external projects as clean references inside your workspace without polluting your repo. It also makes those references visible to AI coding tools, improving how they understand and generate code.

launches.name: Autter - Landing Page Auditor
launches.tagline: Find what’s killing your landing page conversion in seconds
launches.description: Get an instant AI-powered audit of your landing page based on best conversion practices. Covers design, copy, CTAs, trust signals, pricing, and more.

launches.name: AutoJob AI
launches.tagline: AI that writes for you anywhere you type
launches.description: AutoJob AI - Browser extension that writes for you. AI-powered replies on any website in seconds. The fastest way to write emails, DMs, and replies everywhere

launches.name: CerebrateX AI
launches.tagline: CerebrateX is an AI Management Expert & AI Leadership Tool
launches.description: As an AI management expert and AI leadership tool, CerebrateX is guided by four core values:① Advanced Analytics,② Accelerated Thinking③ Clear Decision-Making,④ AI Leadership

launches.name: UGCReal — AI UGC That Looks Humanly Real
launches.tagline: Turn 1 product image into 5 ad-ready UGC video in under 1min
launches.description: Hiring UGC creators is slow, expensive, and unpredictable. UGCReal fixes that. Upload a product image, choose an AI persona, and generate studio-quality UGC videos in seconds — testimonials, unboxings, morning routines, before-and-afters. Get 5 ad-ready variations from a single click. One consistent AI model across all your campaigns for brand cohesion. 4K quality. 29+ languages. No actors, no studios, no scheduling headaches. Join 1,000+ brands already saving thousands per campaign.

launches.name: CC Watcher
launches.tagline: Live Claude Code token usage, right on your desktop
launches.description: Free, 100% local macOS overlay that tracks your Claude Code 5-hour token window in real time. Hook-driven, always on top, zero config, no telemetry. Apple Developer ID signed and notarized. Universal binary (Apple Silicon & Intel).

launches.name: Free LLM API
launches.tagline: Access 1 billion tokens per month for free
launches.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that aggregates free-tier keys from ~14 AI providers with automatic failover. For personal experimentation only. - tashfeenahmed/freellmapi

githubRepo.readmeSnippet:
<div align="center">

# FreeLLMAPI

**One OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Fourteen free LLM providers. ~1.3B+ tokens per month.**

Aggregate the free tiers from Google, Groq, Cerebras, SambaNova, NVIDIA, Mistral, OpenRouter, GitHub Models, Hugging Face, Cohere, Cloudflare, Zhipu, Moonshot, and MiniMax behind a single `/v1/chat/completions` endpoint. Keys are stored encrypted. A router picks the best available model for each request, falls over to the next provider when one is rate-limited, and track

launches.name: Stash
launches.tagline: Hive mind for your agents
launches.description: Stash is a shared memory your team's repos and coding agents. Every session, decision, and search flows into one shared brain. The next agent that touches your repo already knows what's been learned.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet:
Hive mind for your agents.

Stash is a shared memory your team's repos and coding agents. Every session, decision,
and search flows into one shared brain. The next agent that touches your
repo already knows what's been learned.

launches.name: Agent Engine Optimisation
launches.tagline: Soon, your customers won't choose you. Their agents will.
launches.description: Agent Engine Optimisation (AEO) helps businesses become discoverable, understandable, and actionable for AI agents. As search shifts from humans to machines, most businesses aren’t invisible to people, they’re invisible to agents. This launch introduces an AEO Readiness Check that shows how AI systems evaluate your business across discoverability, accessibility, trust, and actionability, and where you’re being skipped.

launches.name: Craftfolio.app
launches.tagline: Turn your CV into a live portfolio, and see who's reading it
launches.description: Upload your CV, pick a template, and go live in minutes at username.craftfolio.app. Then watch who visits, real companies, sections they read, time spent. Stop sending your portfolio into the void. Know when it's working. It's completely free to get started, no credit card, no catch. Just upload your CV and go live in minutes.

launches.name: Wayy.ai
launches.tagline: Self-driving sales for solopreneurs.
launches.description: You know that thing where you say, "I'll do outreach today," and then it's 6 PM, and you haven't? That's every founder I know. Wayy is an AI agent that runs your LinkedIn outbound. Finds prospects, sends connects, and follows up. No integrations or long setup: you log in to your LinkedIn, and Wayy takes everything from there. Chat with Wayy for 2 minutes. It learns your offer and buyer, finds the right people, starts reaching out. 400–600 touches/mo, around 25 interested replies on average.

launches.name: One Thought
launches.tagline: One day. One thought. Zero noise
launches.description: Stop scrolling. Start thinking. One Thought delivers exactly one philosophical insight every 24 hours—curated specifically for your current window of time and place. No archives, no noise, no friction. Just one moment of clarity to carry into your day.

launches.name: Kobin Ai
launches.tagline: The agency OS to replaces Slack, Notion, HubSpot, and Asana
launches.description: Kobin is the AI workspace built for agencies — where AI creates tasks, assigns your team, updates projects, and drafts client messages without being asked. Not just a chat assistant. An AI that executes. From $29/month. sign-up for free at app.kobin.team

launches.name: InvoiceAgent
launches.tagline: From invoice to payment — on autopilot
launches.description: Describe your work in plain English. Get a professional invoice in seconds. Free PDF download, no sign up required.InvoiceAgent turns plain English into professional nvoices and collects payments automatically. Describ your work, AI generates the invoice. Send it from yur own Gmail. When clients don't pay on time, the AIagent sends escalating reminders until you get paid.Free tier includes unlimited AI invoice generation. ro ($17/mo) adds the autopilot collection agent,conracts with e-signatures

launches.name: Jourma
launches.tagline: Forward booking emails. AI builds your trip. Manage by chat
launches.description: Stop juggling 10 booking emails. Forward any reservation to Jourma — AI extracts flights, hotels, car rentals, tours automatically. Real-time flight push notifications (delays, gate changes). Manage trips by chatting on WhatsApp. AI day-by-day itinerary. 11 service types. Multi-currency budgets. Collaborative planning. Offline mode. Free to start; Pro in-app.

launches.name: PopTask v2.0
launches.tagline: 3 seconds from thought to task. No clicks, no app switching.
launches.description: Imagine a thought hits you mid-work. You press one shortcut, type "mtng wth boss in 2hr" or just say it out loud. Three seconds later you're back to what you were doing. The task is scheduled. The reminder is set. And you never switched apps. No forms. No dropdowns. No date pickers. Just your words, typed or spoken. Syncs Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Reminders. No cloud. No account. No tracking. The last to-do app you'll ever download.

launches.name: kremis
launches.tagline: Every LLM claim traced to real data — or rejected
launches.description: LLM claims validated against real data — never invented. Kremis ingests EAV signals, builds a deterministic graph, classifies every response: FACT (direct edge), INFERENCE (derived path), or UNKNOWN (not in data). No confidence scores. No probabilistic gaps. Built in pure Rust (no async, no floats in core), with ACID persistence via redb, HTTP API, CLI, and MCP bridge for Claude/Cursor. Apache 2.0. v0.17.8 — alpha, functional, tested. 354 tests passing.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet:
Kremis

Deterministic knowledge graph for AI that never hallucinates

A minimal, graph-based cognitive substrate in Rust.
Records, associates, retrieves — but never invents.

launches.name: StockDashes
launches.tagline: AI-powered portfolio analysis that finally feels simple
launches.description: I built StockDashes because juggling my portfolio across 10 tabs was driving me insane. Most tools are bloated, expensive, or built for Wall Street pros and not everyday investors like us. So I made it myself: a clean dashboard with AI-powered analysis for your entire portfolio: insider transactions, institutional ownership, earnings calendars, analyst targets, short interest, and more. Free. No ads, no fluff. Your holdings stay on your device, never sold or shared.

launches.name: ASCEND - AI Agent and MCP Control Plane
launches.tagline: Govern AI agents and MCP servers. Enforce. Prove compliance.
launches.description: AI agents and MCP servers are taking real actions in your environment like writing to databases, calling APIs, executing code with no governance controls. ASCEND is the control plane that governs both. Discover every agent and MCP server running in your AWS environment. Enforce what they're allowed to do across 13 independent security layers. Generate SEC, FINRA, NYDFS, SR 11-7, SOC 2, and HIPAA compliance evidence automatically.

launches.name: HyperWorker
launches.tagline: Project management harness for AI agents
launches.description: Your AI agent starts strong...then drifts, loses context, and skips steps. HyperWorker stops that. Six mechanisms in markdown and YAML keep long-running projects on track: Lock (no drift), Atomicity (no "mostly finished"), Dependency (no skipped steps), Memory (session survival), Precedence (rule conflicts), Verification (evidence-based completion). Point your agent at HARNESS.md and it scaffolds everything. Built in Cowork. Works with any LLM that reads files. Open source, MIT licensed.

**Make your Cowork HyperWork.**

Your AI agent starts strong — then forgets the plan, invents new scope, and breaks things it shouldn't touch. HyperWorker stops that.

HyperWorker is a project management harness for LLM agents. Five enforced me

launches.name: IFTTT MCP
launches.tagline: Connect Claude to 1000+ apps, instantly
launches.description: You can use AI to call IFTTT to create, trigger, and access 1000+ integrations. Send a Slack message, turn on your Hue lights, or create your next Applet, all from a chat in Claude.

launches.name: octoscope
launches.tagline: Your GitHub profile as a live terminal dashboard
launches.description: Octoscope is a native terminal dashboard that pulls your GitHub profile, activity, repo health, and network from the GraphQL API — and keeps everything auto-refreshed every 60 seconds. See PRs, issues, commits, languages, stars, followers, and org memberships at a glance. Works for your own account or any public profile: octoscope torvalds. Built in Go with BubbleTea. Open source, MIT-licensed. Install via Homebrew or go install.

launches.name: Locations Code
launches.tagline: A Open Source alternative to Plus Codes and what3words
launches.description: The open alternative to Plus Code and what3words for the supply chain. Locations Code: an 8-character GPS system to optimize last-mile delivery anywhere.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet:
# Locations Code: A Universal GPS Address System

**Locations Code** is a mathematical geocoding algorithm that converts geographic coordinates into a stable, 8-character alphanumeric string. Designed specifically for **logistics, sorting, and last-mile delivery**, it provides a unique and universal alternative to traditional postal addresses.

---

## 🚀 Key Advantages
- **Universal Format:** Always 8 characters, regardless of the location.
- **Language Independent:** No translations or localiz

launches.name: Marillo.ai
launches.tagline: Chat with your relational database
launches.description: Marillo.ai is the AI layer for relational databases. Ask questions in natural language and get answers, CSV tables, and charts from PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MariaDB.

launches.name: Flopex — AI inference routing exchange
launches.tagline: Your AI provider will hit capacity. Your product won't.
launches.description: FLOPEX - Route AI inference jobs to the fastest, cheapest GPU provider in milliseconds. 16,000+ models. 5 live providers. Real-time pricing — picking the winner by cost, latency, and current availability. Like an ad-exchange for inference. What makes it different: - Auto-failover when any provider 429s or 402s - Model catalog drift detection catches provider deprecations - Drop-in OpenAI-compatible The bet: your individual provider will have bad days. The market won't.

launches.name: Skill Inspector
launches.tagline: Audit your AI agent skills to avoid malware
launches.description: Skill Inspector helps you analyze and understand the capabilities, risks, and behaviors of AI skills before they reach production. It inspects how skills are defined, what tools and permissions they rely on, and how they behave across different scenarios. Whether you're building copilots or AI-powered apps, Skill Inspector gives you the visibility and confidence to ship AI safely. Identify risky patterns, validate skill behavior, and ensure your AI does exactly what you expect - no surprises.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet:
Snyk Agent Scan

Discover and scan agent components on your machine for prompt injections
and vulnerabilities (including agents, MCP servers, skills).

> **NEW** Read our [technical report on the emerging threats of the agent skill eco-system](.github/reports/skills-report.pdf) published together with Agent Scan 0.4, which adds support for scanning agent skills.

launches.name: RISA PMT (Project Management Tools)
launches.tagline: Project Management Tools: Kanban+Gantt+Chat+Wiki
launches.description: RISA PMT integrates Kanban, Gantt, chat, and a wiki into one workspace—so teams get real-time visibility and keep decisions tied to work. With upcoming MCP support, RISA will integrate with AI assistants to help teams turn context into action—faster documentation, clearer updates, and less overhead.

launches.name: BragBook
launches.tagline: Track your work wins. Generate career content with AI.
launches.description: Track work accomplishments as they happen, building an organized timeline of your impact. Instantly generate polished summaries, impact statements, performance review prep, and case studies. BragBook is a purpose-built tool that integrates with your favorite platforms like GitHub, Jira, Linear, and more to automatically capture high-impact work. Our scoped and trained AI turns your raw notes into polished, professional career content ready for reviews, resumes, interviews, and your portfolio.

launches.name: FounderUpdate
launches.tagline: Monthly investor updates, written in 5 minutes.
launches.description: Founders spend 1 to 2 hours on monthly investor updates, and when the month is tough they're the first thing to slip. FounderUpdate turns 5 metrics and 10 bullet points into a polished update in 5 minutes, in your voice. You get ready-to-send HTML for Gmail, clean Markdown for Notion, and a board-ready PDF. Start free with 1 update a month, or go paid for unlimited drafts, tone lock from past updates, and white-label PDFs. No investor CRM. No data room. Just the update, written.

launches.name: NartaQ
launches.tagline: Your AI co-pilot to run your entire fundraising
launches.description: NartaQ is your AI co-pilot to run fundraising end-to-end. For investors: • Evaluate startups with built-in risk intelligence (execution, market, founder) • Use the AI Co-Pilot to get structured investment insights in seconds For founders: • Find and explore qualified investors based on real compatibility • Get AI-driven guidance on positioning, gaps, and next steps No blind outreach. No surface-level analysis. Just a structured way to raise and deploy capital.

launches.name: Aseity
launches.tagline: The AI that stops giving answers to start making you think.
launches.description: Stop outsourcing your brain to AI. ChatGPT gives answers, but Aseity asks questions. It’s an “Anti-Answer” AI tool designed to help you find clarity within yourself, not from a prompt. Key Features: • Reflective AI: Asks deep questions to help you own your decisions. • Snap & Schedule: Extract events from photos/URLs straight to your calendar. • All-in-One: Automatically sorts your chat into Schedule, Habits, and Memories. Reclaim your thoughts.

launches.name: Photofy AI
launches.tagline: Turn any photo into a masterpiece with AI
launches.description: Photofy is an AI-powered photo editor built for creators who want fast, high-quality visuals without complex tools. Remove backgrounds, enhance images, add text, shapes, and effects — all in seconds. Whether you're creating social media posts, product images, or marketing content, Photofy helps you go from idea to finished visual instantly. No design skills. No learning curve. Just upload, edit, and create. Free to start, with advanced AI features available via credits.

launches.name: adCasa
launches.tagline: The visual OS for performance marketing.
launches.description: Marketing is too expensive for manual spreadsheets, but too critical to hand to a black-box AI. adGPT is an execution engine. Connect Google Ads, Meta, GA4 and much more on an infinite canvas. Spot a 0.05% drop in ROAS and fix it before you wake up. Run new workflows through a 10,000-lead simulation in the background before spending a real dollar. We replace the manual labor, not the strategist. You set the rules. The machine does the math.

launches.name: Belgarum Clutter
launches.tagline: Turn stuff into product
launches.description: AI-powered personal inventory and resale assistant. Catalog your garage, closet, and storage — then turn clutter into cash.

launches.name: InstantGradient
launches.tagline: Gorgeous mesh gradients. Infinite palettes.
launches.description: Turn color palettes into animated mesh gradients. Hit spacebar, generate harmonious palettes, see them render live as flowing WebGL shader gradients. Lock what you like, shuffle the rest. Export in 4K, MP4, CSS, Tailwind, or React. 4,900+ named color pages. Community palette library. REST API to use our data and algorithm from your own app. No account needed. Just open and start.

launches.name: DevCodex for Joomla
launches.tagline: Free Joomla manifest, htaccess, and plugin-event helpers
launches.description: Four focused Joomla helpers: extension manifest generator, template override finder, plugin event reference, and a Joomla-tunedhtaccess generator. Written for extension developers who want to skip the manifest debugging loop.

launches.name: Jira Dashboards on Any Screen
launches.tagline: Display live Jira dashboards on TVs and screens in seconds
launches.description: Most Jira dashboards live inside tabs no one checks. RocketScreens fixes that. It turns any TV or screen into a live Jira dashboard so your team can see real-time progress without opening Jira. Whether it’s sprint boards, issue tracking, or burndown charts, everything updates automatically and stays visible to everyone. No manual refresh. No screenshots. No extra logins for stakeholders.

launches.name: Public Pages for Confluence
launches.tagline: Turn Confluence pages into public SEO-friendly websites
launches.description: Public Pages for Confluence helps teams publish documentation, help articles, API pages, and other Confluence content as public, SEO-friendly pages in a few clicks. Add a clean URL, custom SEO title and meta description, branding, analytics, and share docs with customers without extra CMS work.Publish any Confluence page to a public SEO-friendly website go live in seconds with no CMS, no designer, and no coding

launches.name: ClipStack
launches.tagline: Never lose a copy. Search, pin, and reuse clipboard
launches.description: ClipStack is a Chrome extension that automatically saves everything you copy — text, URLs, code snippets — into a searchable history. Press Ctrl+Shift+V to open your last 20 clips, search with fuzzy matching, pin the ones you reuse, and re-copy in one click. No account. No cloud. Stored locally in Chrome. Free: 20-clip history + 5 pins. Pro: unlimited clips + export ($3.99 one-time).

launches.name: Open Wearables
launches.tagline: Add health intelligence from any wearable to your app
launches.description: Build personalized AI health products with one API for every wearable, open scoring algorithms you can audit and fork, and structured health context any AI model can reason with. Self-hosted, MIT license, $0 per user.

launches.name: Ubuntu 26.04 Resolute Raccoon
launches.tagline: The next-generation Ubuntu for Developers, AI and Cloud
launches.description: Excited to hunt Ubuntu 26.04 today 🚀🐧 Ubuntu remains one of the most important platforms for developers, open-source builders, and cloud teams 💻☁️ This release brings a stronger mix of performance ⚡, security 🔐, and modern tooling 🛠️ for today’s AI and cloud-native workflows 🤖 Curious to hear from the community — what’s your favorite update in Ubuntu 26.04? 🙌

launches.name: Ignav
launches.tagline: Flight prices & booking links API
launches.description: Ignav is a self-serve API for flight prices and booking links. Search one-way or round-trip fares, filter by price, airline, bags, stops, and time, then use the returned ignav_id to fetch direct airline and OTA booking URLs. It’s built for flight search apps, price trackers, and AI travel tools, with 1,000 free requests and simple usage-based pricing.

launches.name: Nestly
launches.tagline: Manage rentals & leases without the spreadsheet chaos
launches.description: Nestly is a clean, modern property management platform for landlords with 2–10 units. Track leases, tenants, income, and expenses — all in one place. Get a real-time dashboard with cash flow, monthly income, and upcoming rent dates. No bloated features you'll never use. Built for independent landlords in the US and EU. Works in USD and EUR. 30-day free trial, no credit card required.

launches.name: Commons OS:The Architecture of Community
launches.tagline: Scalable systems for high-impact community leaders.
launches.description: Commons OS: A SaaS showroom of white-label community platforms—fully customizable for visionary industries and local leaders. Our architecture allows you to deploy high-end digital hubs without the clunky corporate feel. Featured Suites: Event Suite - scalable vendor directories and attendee UX (as seen in Ask E.) Civic Suite - professional portals for chambers and local gov. Lifestyle Suite - bespoke concierge for luxury properties and local business. Scale beautiful. Launch faster.

launches.name: GoodBooks Asset Suite
launches.tagline: Asset Management Software
launches.description: Get complete asset visibility, predictive maintenance & automated depreciation calculation with our Best Asset Management (EAM) Software in India.

launches.name: Toknary
launches.tagline: Compare token plan pricing, models, and tool support
launches.description: oknary helps builders compare official token plan pricing, supported models, and tool compatibility across platforms, with source attribution and verification dates in one place.

launches.name: Oscar by AbsurdIdea.com
launches.tagline: The AI that tells founders when to stop building
launches.description: Most founders waste months building ideas nobody wants. Oscar validates yours before you code. Submit your idea, get a score, and a clear direction: BUILD, VALIDATE, or STOP. No hype. Just brutal honesty about your idea's potential. Launching today at absurdidea.com - 20% off for founding users.

launches.name: MailerLogic
launches.tagline: Email API with built-in deliverability intelligence
launches.description: MailerLogic is a modern alternative to SendGrid, Mailgun, and Postmark. Send transactional and marketing emails via SMTP or API with built-in stream separation and deliverability intelligence. Analyze health, engagement, risk, and content quality before sending. Includes CRM, automation, campaigns, and 260+ APIs. Send emails and make sure they land.

launches.name: preeco | data protection
launches.tagline: Data protection and information security managed intuitively
launches.description: Managing data protection and information security in your company through one single platform. With connecting AI to the system, processes get simplified and audits are done way faster than in the past. The GDPR-compliant management system supports in professional documentation and control, with data capture workflows, AI-integration through API-Key and a clean user interface.

launches.name: hostcare.app
launches.tagline: Cleaner scheduling for 1–10 property hosts
launches.description: Turn every Airbnb checkout into a booked, confirmed, photo-verified clean. Turn every Airbnb checkout into a booked, confirmed, photo-verified clean. Two-way iCal sync with Airbnb, VRBO and Booking.com. SMS dispatch - your cleaners don't need to download an app, they just tap a link and confirm. Built for hosts with 1–10 properties who've been priced out by enterprise tools and underserved by marketplace apps. Flat $19–79/mo. No contracts, no sales calls, 14-day free trial.

launches.name: ShiftBox
launches.tagline: shift scheduling, employee scheduling, shift planner
launches.description: Планирование смен онлайн без Excel, чатов и ручной рутины. График, табель, уведомления и личный кабинет команды в одном сервисе.

launches.name: Togather.
launches.tagline: Create a digital card for any occasion.
launches.description: Generated by create next app

launches.name: RapidSlot.in
launches.tagline: Build your booking website in 2 minutes — no coding required
launches.description: RapidSlot.in lets you create a complete booking website in just 2 minutes — without writing a single line of code. Launch your portfolio, accept appointments 24/7, and manage services and time slots in one place. Built for small businesses and freelancers who want to go online fast and grow. Share your site instantly and start getting bookings from day one. Plans start at just ₹49/month (less than $1).

launches.name: Cart Keeper
launches.tagline: Save products from different stores in one simple local cart
launches.description: Cart Keeper is a lightweight Chrome extension that lets you save products from online stores into one local list. It detects product pages, saves the name, price, image, and link, and keeps everything in your browser.

launches.name: BOLinkz
launches.tagline: Digital Bills of Lading & POD for Truck Drivers
launches.description: Stop losing bills of lading and delaying payments. BOLinkz lets truck drivers and fleets create, send, and sign BOLs and proof of delivery instantly—right from any phone. No apps, no paperwork, no friction. Text a link, get it signed, and keep every document organized automatically. Built for real trucking workflows where missing paperwork means lost time and money.

launches.name: ibookmarkit
launches.tagline: Save, organize and protect your bookmarks in every browser
launches.description: Browser bookmark extension for Chrome, Edge, Brave, Firefox, Opera and Vivaldi. Save pages instantly with a floating button, organize into categories, add notes and search everything. All data stored locally in your browser — no account needed. Free to install. Pro (CA$9.99 one-time, no subscription) adds encrypted backups, subcategories, PIN protection and more. See it in action: https://youtu.be/Hg0kryevWBI

launches.name: Weblyra
launches.tagline: Paste a YouTube URL. Get 10 content pieces in no time.
launches.description: Turn one YouTube video into 10 pieces of high-performing content in 60 seconds. Blog posts, Twitter threads, LinkedIn posts, Instagram captions, Shorts scripts, and YouTube optimization.

launches.name: Did I Lock It - Home Checklist
launches.tagline: Lock doors, stove & windows
launches.description: Did I Lock It — Peace of Mind in One Tap Ever leave home and suddenly wonder: “Did I lock the door?” “Did I turn off the stove?” Did I Lock It is a simple checklist app that helps you confirm important tasks before leaving — so you can stop second-guessing and enjoy peace of mind.

launches.name: Dropmail
launches.tagline: GENERATE USE VANISH
launches.description: DROPMAIL: Create disposable temporary email addresses that self-destruct after 10 minutes. No registration, no tracking, no logs. Perfect for avoiding spam.

launches.name: Nilav
launches.tagline: For Professionals who seeks Perfection
launches.description: Nilav is the creative studio for artists and content creators. Scripts, visuals, voiceovers, video, blogs, and captions — all in your voice, all in one place. The studio where creative artists build their world.

launches.name: TinyLingo
launches.tagline: Language learning with podcasts
launches.description: Learn languages by listening. Real podcasts and AI-generated stories with tappable transcripts that translate any word or phrase in context, as you listen. Leave behind endless memorization and textbook learning — learn faster through real immersion. TinyLingo surrounds you with authentic podcasts and AI-generated short stories in your target language, complete with synced transcripts and instant, contextual translations.

launches.name: Apify Stats by ParseBird
launches.tagline: Reveal pricing, MAU and last update on Apify actor card
launches.description: Reveal pricing, MAU and last update on Apify actor card. Apify Stats by ParseBird reveals key metrics on every actor card in the Apify Store — so you can compare actors at a glance without clicking into each one. Who is this for: • Apify users comparing web scraping and automation tools • Developers evaluating actors by cost, popularity, and freshness • Teams selecting the best actor for a project without opening dozens of tabs

launches.name: RMS Calculator | Ease Tools
launches.tagline: Calculate root mean square (RMS) values instantly.
launches.description: Calculate root mean square (RMS) values instantly with Ease Tools. Precise results for AC signals and datasets using our advanced mathematical engine.
